occupation: Head of OOH Media and Partnerships at Auckland Transport
headline: OOH Media Strategy & Commercial Partnerships Leader | Delivering Transformational Outcomes Across Transport, Council & Civic Portfolios
summary:
I specialise in transforming publicly owned advertising assets into high-performing media portfolios that deliver tangible value for ratepayers and taxpayers alike.

As Head of Out-of-Home Media & Partnerships at Auckland Transport, I lead the strategy, governance, and delivery of New Zealand’s largest public-sector media partnership, a 10-year agreement covering more than 2,000 assets across bus shelters, transport hubs, vehicles, and billboards. The new agreement guarantees a minimum income to Auckland Transport of $220 million over the next decade, more than doubling annual returns and setting a new benchmark for public-sector media partnerships.

Over a 30-month programme, I have overseen every stage of this transformation, from global benchmarking and procurement design through to board approval, contract mobilisation, and long-term governance setup. The result is a modern, transparent, and commercially robust framework that aligns with council-group strategy, embeds probity and fairness, and delivers lasting financial outcomes for Auckland.

I’m passionate about combining commercial innovation with public accountability, and I enjoy working with diverse partners across government, transport, and media to create sustainable growth, enhance customer experience, and ensure genuine long-term value for the public.

experiences.title: Head of OOH Media and Partnerships

experiences.description: Short term contract to help deliver the Ford Football Ferns vs USA series.

experiences.title: Video Strategist
experiences.description: I'm an enthusiastic, results focused creative thinker with the ability to sell both the concept and the product. I love to challenge the brief and get to the very bones of the problem before building a creative strategy. I can help you with: Video Strategy: concepts, planning, implementation (production), stakeholder and supplier management. Sales and Marketing: planning, strategy, implementation (including staff training). Workshops: Understanding video as a marketing tool (inbound marketing, understanding the buyers journey) and presentation skills. My foundations; a strong background in advertising partnership management across video, digital, outdoor and full service agency, has not only allowed me to build strong relationships with senior leaders across the industry, it has allowed me to set up and run a commercial video unit within New Zealand’s largest media company. I’m proud to be the commercial strategy guy behind everything here: www.nzmevision.co.nz and will stop at nothing to deliver the very best results, even if it means sitting in front of the camera!: https://nzmevision.co.nz/case-study-steptember/ More here https://simonsoulsby.com/

recommendations:
Bronwen Wilkins

Simon is a thorough and passionate creative professional, who can think on the fly and adjust at the spin of a coin.  He is articulate and pushes for clear and considered instruction, leads from the front and adds value and insight on pitches. I am happy to see he is going out on his own to chase his dream, at which I am sure he will be a success.

Suzy O'Connell

I have worked in the same company as Simon and also been a client of Simon's recently. Simon is a very special operator indeed, his 'way' with clients was so impressive. Immediately you could feel a sense of relief when Simon presented his incredible ideas and treatment for the video work we've worked on together. My clients were so impressed with his methodology, strategic thinking, clever techniques and ability to deliver incredible results. Simon is truely a multi-talented creative, a professional producer, creative advertising genius and marketing guru. I'd be keen to work with Simon again and would recommend working with Simon in a heart-beat!
